use_cases: Primary action triggers like form submissions or navigation events
Destructive actions requiring visual warning styling
Secondary outline-styled actions for alternative workflows
Ghost button styling for tertiary actions within content
Icon-only compact buttons for toolbar or navigation contexts
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Supports loading states, left/right icon slots, and asChild composition via Radix UI. Built with class-variance-authority for clean variant management and full accessibility support.
